problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
